assignments.name: strategyReport
assignments.value:
🎯 *Content Strategy Report: {{ $json.brand.toUpperCase() }}*

*Strategy Score:* {{ $json.strategy_score.overall_score.toFixed(1) }}% (Grade {{ $json.strategy_score.grade }})

*Performance Breakdown:*
• Content Diversity: {{ $json.strategy_score.individual_scores.content_diversity.toFixed(0) }}%
• Platform Coverage: {{ $json.strategy_score.individual_scores.platform_coverage.toFixed(0) }}%
• Posting Frequency: {{ $json.strategy_score.individual_scores.posting_frequency.toFixed(0) }}%
• Audience Alignment: {{ $json.strategy_score.individual_scores.audience_alignment.toFixed(0) }}%

*Insights Generated:* {{ $json.insights_summary.total_insights }} ({{ $json.insights_summary.high_priority }} high priority)

*Priority Actions:*
{{ $json.action_items.slice(0, 3).map((item, i) => `${i+1}. ${item.action.substring(0, 80)}...`).join('
') }}

*Next Analysis:* Tomorrow 8 AM
